title: Premium Winter Holidays in Harbin & Beijing 2026
details: Experience China’s magical winter! Visit Harbin’s Ice and Snow World, Dejia Wharf, Songhua River, Mingdu Ski Resort, and the Great Wall of China. Enjoy snow adventures, local delicacies, and breathtaking winter scenery — all in one unforgettable holiday!
flyer: assets/data/packages/asia/Premium Winter Holidays in Harbin & Beijing 2026/Flyer_1764575933.png

itinerary.day_details: Meet at NAIA Terminal 1 for flight check-in. Enjoy in-flight amenities. Flight details: CA180 MNL–PEK 06:20–10:55, then CA1639 PEK–HRB 20:25–22:20. Meet your Beijing Tour Guide and have lunch at the airport. Upon arrival in Harbin, meet the local tour guide, transfer to the hotel, and rest.

After breakfast, visit Cotton Padded Jacket Shop, Harbin Saint Nicholas Cathedral, enjoy vodka tasting at the castle, visit Petrow Art Palace, Outlook Harbin Little Birch Restaurant, and experience Snow Tubing.

After breakfast, explore Harbin’s Winter Swimming Show, Harbin Sun Island Snow Expo (with battery car), Dejia Wharf Ice and Snow Carnival, Songhua River Car (one way), Baroque Buildings, and Lao Ding Feng Ice Cream.
After breakfast, visit Mingdu Ski Resort for a 2-hour skiing experience (includes snowshoes, snowboard, and snow poles). Proceed to Harbin Ice Snow World.

After breakfast, stroll through Harbin’s Central Pedestrian Street, Middle East Railways Bridge, and Sophia Cathedral Square. Pass by Big Snowman. Transfer to airport for flight CA1622 HRB–PEK 21:20–23:30. Meet Beijing Tour Guide and transfer to hotel for overnight stay.
After breakfast, visit the Great Wall of China, experience Chinese Hanfu cultural dress-up, and enjoy shopping at Jewelry Shop (2-hour stay).
After breakfast, visit Tiananmen Square and the Forbidden City. Transfer to airport for flight CA179 PEK–MNL 19:00–00:05. Arrive Manila February 15, 2026.

inclusions: Roundtrip airfare via Air China (with Airline tax and PH tax)
Meals as per itinerary (Lunch and Dinner)
Private coach for the entire tour
exclusions: Other items not mentioned in the itinerary
extra_details: Mode of Payment: ₱17,500/pax down payment. Full payment required 45 days before travel.
